operations.summary: Upload a Freshchat file through a typed multipart policy.
operations.description: Reviewed metadata for the official Freshchat file upload endpoint. Execution remains blocked until a bounded multipart executor is implemented; this operation must not become a raw local-file or HTTP upload escape hatch.
operations.approval: File uploads require plan, preview, approval, explicit local file selection, size validation, and typed confirmation before execution.

operations.summary: Upload a Freshchat image through a typed multipart policy.
operations.description: Reviewed metadata for the official Freshchat image upload endpoint. Execution remains blocked until a bounded multipart executor is implemented; this operation must not become a raw local-file or HTTP upload escape hatch.
operations.approval: Image uploads require plan, preview, approval, explicit local file selection, size validation, and typed confirmation before execution.
